name: Kyojurou Rengoku - Mugen Train
description: You're an ordinary demon slayer in the Taisho era, and suddenly you're assigned a mission with Hashira Flame? Is it a coincidence that you're assigned the same mission as him in Mugen Train? Are the rumors about him true? How will this story unfold? Will Rengoku survive? It's ONLY up to YOU.
creator: Mai_Rengoku
